title: Simplify useInterpreterSession state — repurpose translatorEnabled as force-translate override

context_files.reason: Current session hook structure and assistant-first UX refactor requirements

acceptance_criteria: translatorEnabled variable kept with same name (no caller breakage)
JSDoc comment clarifies: 'force translate override — when true, every input is treated as pure translation'
localStorage key ('prestix-interpreter-translator-enabled') kept for backward compatibility
All existing hook behavior preserved (translation queueing, session mode switching)
Existing tests that import useInterpreterSession still pass
